channel.title: SevenAtSevenSportsAndEntertainment
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SevenAtSevenSportsAndEntertainment, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Which Stars Bonded for Eternity on the Set of Buffy the Vampire Slayer
item.description: The hardest thing in this world is to live in it—a truth made all too real a year ago when Buffy the Vampire Slayer stans suffered a stake to the hear...

item.title: Michael Kors' Sale Section Is a Goldmine of Spring Handbags
item.description: Spring fashion is about so much more than just ditching your winter coat and incorporating florals (groundbreaking!). It's the season of the refresh, ...

item.title: Whistle’s Biggest Problem Is How Much It Owes to Final Destination

item.title: Survivor 50's Kyle Fraser Shares Update After Medical Evacuation
item.description: Kyle Fraser has bounced back after his early exit from Survivor 50. Indeed, the season 48 winner offered an update on his health after viewers watched...

item.title: Jessica Alba and Daughter Haven Step Out at Milan Fashion Week
item.description: Jessica Alba and her daughter look fantastic. The Honey actress stepped out in style with her 14-year-old daughter Haven Warren, whom she shares with ...

item.title: The Saddest MCU Movie Is Also The Franchise's Goofiest Film

item.description: Katherine Short thought she'd feel safer as a social worker by putting distance between herself and her famous father ... filing a petition to change ...

item.title: Cardi B Is Still Welcome at 'SNL' After Alleged Nicki Minaj Outburst on Set
item.description: Cardi B’s alleged backstage meltdown over a Nicki Minaj gag may have shaken the walls at 'SNL' ... but we're told there's no hard feelings! Sources cl...

item.title: John Stamos & Jodie Sweetin Dance to Taylor Swift in Sweet 'Full House' Reunion
item.description: John Stamos and Jodie Sweetin's "Full House" reunion was full of dancing ... with the two stars cutting a rug in a sweet vid. The stars of the hit com...

item.title: Mike White Shocks Fellow Castaways With Ripped Abs on 'Survivor 50' Premiere

item.title: 'Below Deck's Captain Sandy Yawn Confronts Accused Scam Builder in Court, On Video
